THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLUB DONATELLO HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WITTRIG,ROBERT TRUSTEE WITTRIG FAMILY TRUST $446.99 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $467.99, DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DONNA WITTRIG.
